ats_utilities.info.name.iname module¶

Module

iname.py

Info

Defines abstract class IName with method(s). Interface for the name mechanism.

class ats_utilities.info.name.iname.IName[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class IName with method(s). Interface for the name mechanism. Note: Name is only prepared when it is set by user (not None).

It defines:

methods:
name - Property methods for set/get operations.
not_none - Checks if name is not None.
__str__ - Returns the name as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract property name: str | None¶

Property method for getting name. Note: Name is only prepared when it is set by user (not None).

Returns:

The name in string format | None

Return type:

<str | None>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract not_none() → bool[source]¶

Checks if name is not None. Note: Name is only prepared when it is set by user (not None).

Returns:

True (not None) | False (None).

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.
